answers.where: Hangar on a bright Roblox-like studs arena with the sourced Assault Walker as the main hero mech.
answers.action: Inspect the upgraded mech silhouette, then press Battle to test it against drones.
answers.response: The Assault Walker now renders with attached kitbash cannons, visor/vents, hydraulics, and rocket module mounts that move with bob, recoil, heat, and walk state.
answers.reward: The player sees a more modular owned mech and can take it into battle for salvage and upgrades.
answers.game_look: Large imported mech model, attached mechanical parts, toy-block arena dressing, readable text, bright colors, and HUD controls make this read as a casual Roblox-like mech battler.

issues.text: Assault Walker now has visible kitbashed mechanical attachments, but final quality still needs a true rigged/source-authored articulation pass and richer sourced/generated textures.
